g.text: ESP32 VOLTAGE SENSE TAP → BAT terminals
BAT+ and BAT− connect to voltage divider circuit
Set LOAD output to: Always ON
* GPIO34/35 are input-only (ADC1). Do not drive high.
* All GPIO logic is 3.3V — do NOT connect 5V signals.
Filtered vent · Mounted near charge controller
Wires that connect (vs crossing without connecting)
